testcase.name: testAccountLockoutAfterFailedAttempts

failure.message: expected [Nalog je zaključan zbog više neuspešnih pokušaja.] but found [Email ili lozinka nisu u redu.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Nalog je zaključan zbog više neuspešnih pokušaja.] but found [Email ili lozinka nisu u redu.] at tests.LoginTest.testAccountLockoutAfterFailedAttempts(LoginTest.java:196) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:842) ...
